name: Clinkz
description: Better to run than curse the road.

abilities.name: Infernal Shred
abilities.description: Attacks now apply an armor piercing stacking debuff that affects the armor damage factor. Only affects attack damage sourced to Clinkz' and his Skeleton Archers.

abilities.name: Strafe
abilities.description: The buff grants a portion of the bonus attack speed to all ignited Archers.

abilities.name: Searing Arrows
abilities.description: Imbues Clinkz' and his Skeleton Archers' arrows with spell damage bonus. The spell damage bonus fully affects buildings.

abilities.name: Death Pact
abilities.description: Sutherex' bond of life and death has become a part of Clinkz, and his old bones are refreshed with repetition of the pact on lesser beings.

abilities.name: Burning Army
abilities.description: Summons an array of fiery Skeleton Archers toward the point-targeted direction.

abilities.name: Burning Barrage
abilities.description: Channels and shoots multiple piercing arrows in the target direction that hit all enemy units for a portion of Clinkz' attack damage while applying attack modifiers.

abilities.name: Skeleton Walk
abilities.description: The archers deal a portion of Clinkz' damage, with their attack range set equal to Clinkz'. They automatically attack nearby enemy heroes upon spawn, regardless of auto-attack settings. All ' properties correspond to 's attributes. The Archers apply of Clinkz' corresponding ability level when acquired. Creates a Skeleton Archer of the corresponding level upon death at Rubick's current location.
